description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master, dependabot, feat, and tags matching v*.*.*, and on pull requests to master. Run a matrix build with Node.js versions 10.x, 12.x, and 14.x on macOS, Ubuntu, and Windows environments. For each environment, install dependencies with yarn, run tests with coverage, and report to Coveralls. Finally, aggregate coverage calculations in a separate ubuntu-latest job.
